organic_results.title: Machine code - Wikipedia
organic_results.snippet: Machine code is classified as native with respect to its host CPU since it is the language that the CPU interprets directly. Some software interpreters ...

organic_results.title: How Programming Languages Are Converted into Machine Code
organic_results.snippet: 10 Dec 2025 ... 1. Direct Compilation to Machine Code. Some languages compile straight to machine code for a specific CPU and OS. Examples: C, C++, Rust, Go.
